headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Costco Wholesale (COST) After Its Strong Multi Year Rally
summary: With Costco Wholesale stock around US$1,041.25, you might be wondering whether the current price is offering value or asking you to pay up for quality. Over the short term, the stock has returned 2.9% over the last 7 days, 6.8% over the last 30 days, 21.9% year to date, and 3.6% over the last year, which gives useful context before comparing the price to underlying fundamentals. For long term holders, the stock has delivered 117.6% over 3 years and 186.5% over 5 years, so any fresh news...

headline: The Path to $160: The Upside Case for Walmart
summary: Walmart (NYSE: WMT) is currently trading at a 49x trailing earnings multiple - well above its historical average of 31x. While industry peers like Target Corp (NYSE: TGT) trade at significantly lower multiples, this article presents the upside case for Walmart, arguing that its premium reflects a structural pivot from a high-volume grocer to a high-margin platform.

headline: Two Small-Cap Stocks Under $15 For Retail Investors
summary: Packaged foods is the kind of sector retail investors tend to scroll past, yet it is quietly one of the steadiest demand engines in the economy. headline: Costco Is Innovating Its Way to More Growth, Says Analyst. Plus, Valvoline and 3 More Stocks.
summary: Shares of Valvoline recently dipped about 5% and have essentially given up all of the gains following a strong fiscal second-quarter print.  Private operators are likely to push through price increases as an offset.  Valvoline has also taken additional price increase in recent weeks.

Private operators are likely to push through price increases as an offset.  Valvoline has also taken additional price increase in recent weeks.
